info.title: E-Commerce Ordering & Payment API
info.description: Backend for managing users, products, orders, and payments with support for multiple payment providers (Stripe, bKash).

post.description: Register a new general (non-admin) user. Email must be unique.
Exchange email + password for a Bearer access token.

schema.title: Response Read Own Orders Api V1 Users Me Orders Get
Response Read Own Payments Api V1 Users Me Payments Get
Response List Users Api V1 Users Get

patch.description:
Admin activate/deactivate a user. `is_active` is taken from the body;
`full_name` is ignored here (that's the user's own via PATCH /users/me).

schema.title: Response List Categories Api V1 Categories Get

get.description: DFS-rendered category tree (Redis-cached). Pass `?root_id=` for one subtree.

schema.title: Response Get Category Tree Api V1 Categories Tree Get

delete.description: Delete a category. Returns 409 if it still has subcategories or products.

get.description: Active products in this category and every descendant category (DFS branch).

schema.title: Response List Category Products Api V1 Categories  Category Id  Products Get

get.description:
Browse products. Defaults to active-only; `?status=inactive` overrides.
Optional `category_id` and `search` (name substring) filters.

schema.title: Response List Products Api V1 Products Get

delete.description: Soft delete — marks the product inactive (row and order history retained).

get.description: Related products, found by DFS over the product's category branch.

schema.title: Response Recommend Products Api V1 Products  Product Id  Recommendations Get

post.description:
Place an order for one or more products. Totals are computed server-side;
the order starts `pending` and reserves no stock.
Cancel one of your own orders (only while it is still `pending`).

Initiate payment for one of your `pending` orders with the chosen provider.
Returns the provider-specific payload the client needs to finish paying
(Stripe `client_secret`, or the bKash redirect URL).

schema.title: Response Checkout Api V1 Orders  Order Id  Checkout Post

post.description:
Stripe payment webhook. The raw body + `Stripe-Signature` header are
verified inside the strategy; on `payment_intent.succeeded` the order is
marked paid and stock reduced. Safe to retry (idempotent).

schema.title: Response Stripe Webhook Api V1 Payments Stripe Webhook Post

BkashCheckoutResponse.title: BkashCheckoutResponse
BkashCheckoutResponse.description: Returned to the client so it can redirect the user into bKash's flow.

CategoryTreeNode.title: CategoryTreeNode
CategoryTreeNode.description: Recursive shape returned by the cached DFS category tree endpoint.

CategoryUpdate.title: CategoryUpdate
CategoryUpdate.description:
All fields optional — admin PATCH endpoint.

Fields are applied via `model_dump(exclude_unset=True)`, so passing
`parent_id: null` explicitly re-parents to a root, while omitting it
leaves the parent unchanged.

OrderItemCreate.title: OrderItemCreate
OrderItemCreate.description:
Client only sends product_id + quantity. price/subtotal are never
trusted from the client — OrderService looks up the live Product.price
server-side and computes both deterministically.

PaymentInitiate.title: PaymentInitiate
PaymentInitiate.description: Body for POST /orders/{order_id}/checkout — user picks a provider.

ProductUpdate.title: ProductUpdate
ProductUpdate.description: All fields optional — admin PATCH endpoint.

StripeCheckoutResponse.title: StripeCheckoutResponse
StripeCheckoutResponse.description: Returned to the client so it can complete the Stripe client-side confirm step.
